title: Worm Soup
description: A modpack I made because the other modpacks I played didn't have the things I wanted. so I decided to make my own, i hope anyone else who plays it enjoys my modpack as well.
body: This is a modpack by my friends and I made for one thing, to be continued upon. its purpose was originally only to be played by us on the Worm Soup Discord server but it has a different goal now, to be the modpack for anyone dissatisfied with the other modpacks not having what they want. feel free to add more mods and completely change everything about it, its for the player and friends to decide, have fun and I most likely will be adding to this for me and my friends as well so look forward to it!
